CREATE TABLE numbers (a INT, b INT);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (0, 0);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (1, 1);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (12, 15);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (27, 36);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (-12, -15);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (-27, 36);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (0, 15);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (-1, 0);
SELECT gcd(a, b) AS gcd_value FROM numbers;
SELECT gcd(a, b) AS gcd_value FROM (SELECT a, b FROM numbers WHERE a > 0 AND b > 0);
SELECT gcd(a, (SELECT MAX(b) FROM numbers WHERE b > 0)) AS gcd_value FROM numbers;
SELECT SUM(gcd(a, b)) AS total_gcd FROM numbers;
SELECT a, b, gcd(a, b) AS gcd_value FROM numbers WHERE a < 0 OR b < 0;
SELECT a, b, gcd(a, b) AS gcd_value FROM (SELECT * FROM numbers WHERE a > -10 AND b < 20) AS temp;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT gcd(a, b) AS gcd_value FROM numbers;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results WHERE gcd_value > 5;
SELECT a, b, gcd(a, b) AS gcd_value FROM numbers ORDER BY gcd_value DESC;
CREATE TABLE test_divide_by_zero (m INT);
INSERT INTO test_divide_by_zero VALUES (0);
SELECT gcd(a, b) FROM test_divide_by_zero CROSS JOIN numbers WHERE m = 0;
